name: Paladin

abilities.name: Oathbrand
abilities.desc: Fills you with Holy power for 30 sec, causing each of your melee swings to deal 4 additional Holy damage. Unleash with Verdict.

abilities.name: Steadfast Aura
abilities.desc: Increases your armor by 40 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Verdict
abilities.desc: Unleashes your active Seal upon the enemy, consuming it to deal its judgement damage.

abilities.name: Oath of Iron
abilities.desc: Places a Blessing on a friendly target, increasing attack power by 15 for 5 min.

abilities.name: Ward of Faith
abilities.desc: A holy shield absorbs 50 damage for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Last Rite
abilities.desc: A massive surge of healing: restores 250 health. 10 min cooldown.

abilities.name: Lightmend
abilities.desc: A quick, efficient flash of Light that heals a friendly target for $d.

abilities.name: Rite of Expulsion
abilities.desc: Banishes the wicked with Holy wrath, causing $d Holy damage.

abilities.name: Holy Ground
abilities.desc: Consecrates the ground beneath you, searing nearby enemies for $d Holy damage.

abilities.name: Burning Oath
abilities.desc: Increases the threat generated by your Holy damage by 60% for 30 min. The tanking paladin's cornerstone.

abilities.name: Requital Aura
abilities.desc: Surrounds you with holy energy for 30 min, dealing 5 Holy damage to any enemy that strikes you in melee.

playbook: You are playing a Paladin (mana-based, melee).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: if mana < 20% and out of combat, drink before pulling.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to 5 yards (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
